creator: will@sundivenetworks.com
text:
As of 2015-08-25 the version of iocage in the quarterly branch is 1.6.2. 

Is the plan to update quarterly to 1.7.3? Otherwise iocage doesn't support creating 10.2-RELEASE jails on 10.2-RELEASE. This would seem to be a big enough issue not to wait for the next quarterly release.
